text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Sixteen racers are all vying to become number
one in Japan today! The Grand Prix and final race
of the year, the Arima Kinen, is about to begin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Oguriii! You've got it in you to be a two-time
winner here! You're the greatest racer out there!

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Good luck, Creek! Now's your chance to make up
for last year and show us what you've got!

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
The final battle of the year is here, but who will
be the winner? Oguri Cap or Super Creek? Or
maybe someone else entirely! Everything hinges
on this race!

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
We dream of seeing the best win, but we don't
want to be stuck in mires of boredom and
stalemates. You're the answer to combating such
things, Inari One.

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
Show us what you're made of! Show us what this
generation can do! And show us what the Twinkle
Series is really about!

text_block_list.name: Townspeople
text_block_list.text:
Gooo, Inariiii!
You can do iiit!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: Lay your soul on that track, Inari!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! This isn't the biggest race of the year for
nothin'! You can really feel the heat!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I've never been this nervous before... or this
scared.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: But that's why...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That's why I gotta let my soul burn with all I've
got!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: This anxiety 'n' fear are proof that this is the moment I've been waitin' for! I'm carrying all the hopes of everyone back home, so this is my festival!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'll show 'em all! I'm gonna let everyone see the
true spirit of a festival—the soul behind their
style!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Keep your eyes on me, partner! I'll light up the
sky above Nakayama with fireworks so bright,
they'll write about 'em in the history books!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Right! See ya soon!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪ Inari looks so determined.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Something good must've happened.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That's really impressive. She looks like she's on
fire.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I won't shy from that heat. I'll take it head-on.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (That's right! Clean your ears, everybody!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Listen to the sky-piercing, earth-shaking music
pouring from my heart! This is true music! This is
the grand spirit of festival music!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Come one, come all! Gather 'round and listen
close!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Born 'n' raised among the real locals, I'm an
Umamusume with Oi flair! It's me, the Edo
girl—Inari One!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hold on tight, 'cause the Arima Kinen's about to
start! This is the battle that decides fates, the
biggest festival in the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I stand here to challenge the best there is! Don't
you dare blink or you'll miss my claim to victory!
